module_mood_contract: M5 mechanical rescue — 'Ahh, this is actually fixable.' One shape of output measured empirically; rescue, not triumph: M3 strategic uncertainty and M4 security residual stay standing; the judge names what it cannot reach. Hand-off to M6 is hunger, not closure.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Meta-frame lectures are closers, not openers.
rules_evaluated.evidence: grounded.md sits as opener (arms with discipline + four candidates to measure); self-consistency-after-scoreboard.md sits as closer naming what the exercise made felt. Pattern is correctly placed.

Opener arms (spirit + diagnostic lens + empirical-selection primitive); the named scoreboard recognition stays in the closer. M5 is canonical contrast-mood; opener does not pre-empt the felt evidence.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Walk-away test — student leaves while agent works.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Four parallel detectors + scorer pass create a multi-minute agent wait the student watches; reading every reply is not the mode.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forcing functions live in prompts, not body prose.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Debrief forcing functions (touch only Groundedness checks section, read back verbatim, confirm each rule lands, name two patterns enforced, name LEAST-confident claim) all live inside the fenced Debrief prompt. The body callout after the prompt is recognition prose per the §16 carve-out.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Body teaches the work; trainer manages the room outside text.
rules_evaluated.evidence: No authored conversation cues, pause beats, neighbour-share, or room-discuss sentences anywhere in body. Long agent waits stand as natural pause anchors without authored cue.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Between-module reading appears in two places.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Homework after Module 5 section names Mollick 'Garbage Can and Bitter Lesson.' Cross-file placement (M6 Prework) verified at neighbour-alignment scope, not this judge's narrow lens.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Cross-module artefact contracts explicit at both ends.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Producing module names judges/groundedness-judge.md as the artefact saved at exercise close (Start here line 24, Debrief prompt scan list, maintainer Delineation block line 128). Strategy doc M6 entry confirms M6 picks it up by the same path.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Mood contract named and honoured (rescue, not triumph).
rules_evaluated.evidence: Mood contract anchored by THREE surviving anchors after the still-uncertain.md cycle removal: (a) Key Concepts line 43 'What the judge can't reach. The benchmark was 30 claims. A production judge wants hundreds...' — explicit not-solved beat; (b) philosophy callout line 116 'Belief — name what you don't know — lands in the judge's Known limit: line' — the produced artefact carries the rescue-not-triumph signature on its face; (c) Start here lines 22-24 'your Module 3 doubt and your Module 4 residuals stay where they are.' The maintainer block lines 119-123 explicitly point to (a) and (c) as the close anchors. Close lands rescue cleanly without the removed file-write artefact.
Unease is not-knowing-yet ('LEAST confident you caught correctly,' 'Known limit:'), never having-done-wrong. Big Idea frames empirical method selection as a discipline, not a remediation.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Lead with the discipline, not the failure mode.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Big Idea leads with empirical method selection. Key Concepts lead with 'Benchmarking as a pattern' and 'Empirical method selection over authority' — positive disciplines. Hallucination is named as the negative case the discipline addresses, not the opener.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Strategy-fidelity — no front-running, cross-module sequencing correct.
rules_evaluated.evidence: M5 stays on the benchmark; automation, scaling, and corrections-feeding-back are deferred to M6 (Next section + Delineation block). M3 strategic uncertainty and M4 security residual are explicitly preserved. Detector count (four) is internally consistent across body, Key Concepts, Debrief, maintainer block — the prior REVISE on count-mismatch with strategy doc was a doc-side, not file-side, drift; outside this judge's narrow lens.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Strategic themes recur in Key Concepts.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Key Concepts surfaces empirical method selection over authority, benchmarking as a portable pattern, narrow judge (discipline not omniscience), grounded as the discipline. Three-plus theme instances present in module's own voice.
All seven phase scores 8 or 9. Close 8. No beat below 8. Setup/launch beats are absent (this is a content-rich module spine, no fire-up-the-tool beats).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Mood doesn't resolve early — M3 uncertainty and M4 residual kept standing; rescue not triumph survives the still-uncertain.md removal.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Three redundant rescue-not-triumph anchors stand without the removed file-write: (1) body line 43 'A production judge wants hundreds...,' (2) philosophy callout line 116 pointing to the judge's 'Known limit:' line on the saved artefact, (3) Start here lines 22-24 explicitly preserving M3 doubt + M4 residual. Debrief prompt LEAST-confident-claim line is a fourth anchor inside the fenced prompt. The cycle's removal of the (c)-only file write does not reduce closing pressure — the close was already redundantly anchored. PRIOR ambiguous_instruction flag at instances/output-quality.story.json line 201 (still-uncertain.md file reference) RESOLVES — `grep -n still-uncertain` returns no matches.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Teaching moment lands reliably across persona-skill variation.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Scoreboard is the structural mechanism — fills regardless of persona skill level. Even a fast operator skipping body prose runs the four-detector + scorer flow and sees the winner emerge. Teaching moment is in the artefact, not the prose around it.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Big Idea fidelity — file honours the strategy doc's framing.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Strategy doc center of gravity: GROUNDED as the discipline, benchmarking as the empirical method. File Big Idea leads with empirical selection ('You don't pick a quality check because someone said so'). Key Concepts first bullet: 'Benchmarking as a pattern.' Aligns.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Module-to-module arc — close hands off to M6's open hook.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Next: '30 claims, four detectors, one judge. Now imagine the benchmark has three hundred claims, the judge runs on every build, and its own corrections feed back into the next round. That's evals.' Hunger seam to M6 sharp.
